_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulation of ERK signaling modulates GABA release and learning.

_contextSnippet: The control lines, as well as the Nf1 and the αCaMKII+/− Nf1 mice spent more time searching in the quadrant where the platform was during training
details: Showed normal spatial learning - spent more time searching in training quadrant than other quadrants, similar to controls
